snippets.title: Creating a Relation (Table)
snippets.code:
-- Define relation schema
CREATE TABLE Student (
    student_id INT,           -- Attribute: student identifier
    name VARCHAR(100),        -- Attribute: student name
    gpa DECIMAL(3,2),         -- Attribute: grade point average
    enrollment_date DATE      -- Attribute: enrollment date
);

-- Insert tuples (rows)
INSERT INTO Student VALUES
    (101, 'Alice', 3.80, '2023-09-01'),
    (102, 'Bob', 3.25, '2023-09-01'),
    (103, 'Carol', 3.90, '2022-09-01');
snippets.explanation: CREATE TABLE defines relation schema; INSERT adds tuples to the relation instance

snippets.title: Relational Algebra in SQL
snippets.explanation: SQL implements relational algebra operations with different syntax

snippets.title: Join Operations
snippets.explanation: Joins combine related tuples from multiple relations
